author: juzigu40-ui
title: Tri-state full-sweep logic allows evidence-free holistic attestation to suppress coverage debt
notes: All 5 code references verified. import_holistic_issues defaults full_sweep_included to None; update_holistic_review_cache only stores booleans so None is omitted; detect_review_coverage uses 'is not False' treating None as full sweep; resolve_holistic_coverage_issues auto-resolves markers; auto_resolved absent from FAILURE_STATUSES_BY_MODE. Real scoring integrity chain but requires empty holistic import without explicit review_scope. Partial overlap with S118 (same downstream None-as-full-sweep effect through different entry path).
